summary: Add conversational agent runtime and API/UI integration surface with durable runtime-control coupling.
rationale: The remaining change slice adds conversation agent lifecycle, activity projection, BFF routes, and generated API contract updates. It crosses the default one-layer PR threshold and must be evaluated as part of the same runtime-control initiative.
dependency_rationale: Conversation and UI wiring relies on the updated dependency and toolchain set carried in this slice.
deletion_targets: runtime-control coupling spread across PRs with inconsistent PR governance metadata
manual activity lifecycle stitching in callers before durable projection support
ad hoc API contract drift outside generated schema workflows
line_count_rationale: The base config file is oversized and intentionally updated as part of this integration slice.
risks: Conversation routes and activity projection should stay aligned with runtime-control event semantics before downstream UI assumptions change.
Schema and route contract updates must remain in sync while avoiding manual drift in `schema.d.ts`.
